text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her resolve thus renewed, Narita<n>Taishin and I set
our sights on the<n>spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
An injury forces Winning Ticket to<n>pull out of the
race, leaving Narita<n>Taishin and Biwa Hayahide to
battle it<n>out, one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Will Narita Taishin's powerful<n>finishing sprint win?
Or will Biwa<n>Hayahide's winning equation bring
her to victory?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The curtain is set to rise on the tense<n>battle
between the two racers.
